---
title: "Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Project"
---

This was a team-based predictive analytics project analyzing historical flight data from the Buffalo Niagara International Airport to identify airline performance trends, delays, and operational efficiency.

My individual contributions are outlined in the tab below.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Notebook (Main)

```{=html}
<iframe src="./Buffalo%20Flights%20Data%20Analysis%20Folder/fligh_data.ipynb" style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:0;"></iframe>
```

## README

```{=markdown}
`r paste(readLines("Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Folder/ReadMe.md"), collapse = "\n")`
```

## Individual Contributions

```{=markdown}
`r paste(readLines("Buffalo Flights Data Analysis Folder/Ran Xin Jiang’s Individual Contributions.md"), collapse = "\n")`
```

:::
